output:
# Languages
en

# Lyrics
[Intro - Guitar Riff]

[Verse 1]
Teeth on steel
Tongue drips rust
Every promise
Ground to dust
Skull full of sirens, static in my lungs
Bite down on the fuse, feel the planet come undone

[Chorus]
I am the shrapnel of the sun
(Hey!)
Burning holes in everyone
Spit that venom, choke that lie
If the world wants war, then let it die
Shrapnel of the sun
Tear the sky

[Guitar Solo]

[Verse 2]
Cheap blue pills for a dead-end dream
Leaders line up for the guillotine
Billboard halos over rot and mold
Smile for the camera while your heart gets sold

[Chorus]
I am the shrapnel of the sun
(Woah! Woah!)
Burning holes in everyone
Spit that venom, choke that lie
If the world wants war, then let it die
Shrapnel of the sun
Tear the sky

[Bridge]
Tear the sky!
Tear the sky!
Tear the sky!
Drink the ash to the glass, count your sins on broken hands
All your gods built of sand, I'm the crack you can't withstand
Yeah!

[Outro - Guitar Solo]
